requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety (230 V / 50 Hz — Type D/G Plug)

summary.en: The Maldives operates on 230 V / 50 Hz mains supply. The most common socket type is BS 1363 Type G (British standard three-pin), with some Type D (large round three-pin) installations also present. Electrical safety requirements for electronic products are assessed as part of the CAM type approval and MNSO product standards framework, with IEC 60950-1 / IEC 62368-1 test evidence accepted. Product power supplies must be compatible with 230 V / 50 Hz input. Plug and socket adaptors are widely used in the Maldives; products with non-Type-G plugs require adaptor guidance in local packaging.
summary.zh: 马尔代夫主电源为230V / 50Hz。最常见的插座类型为BS 1363 G型（英国标准三脚插头），部分地区也有D型（大圆形三脚插头）设施。电子产品的电气安全要求在CAM型式认可和MNSO产品标准框架下进行评估，接受IEC 60950-1 / IEC 62368-1测试证据。产品电源须兼容230V / 50Hz输入。马尔代夫广泛使用插头和插座转换器；非G型插头产品须在本地包装中提供转换器使用指引。
summary.zht: 馬爾地夫主電源為230V / 50Hz。最常見的插座類型為BS 1363 G型（英國標準三腳插頭），部分地區也有D型（大圓形三腳插頭）設施。電子產品的電氣安全要求在CAM型式認可和MNSO產品標準框架下進行評估，接受IEC 60950-1 / IEC 62368-1測試證據。產品電源須相容230V / 50Hz輸入。馬爾地夫廣泛使用插頭和插座轉換器；非G型插頭產品須在本地包裝中提供轉換器使用指引。

standards_or_laws: IEC 60950-1 (IT Equipment Safety — legacy, transitioning to IEC 62368-1)

summary.en: China operates on 220 V / 50 Hz with Type A/I sockets (GB 2099 series). CCC certification covers electrical safety for in-scope products using GB 4943.1 (IT equipment safety, aligned with IEC 62368-1). Chinese products are commonly manufactured with universal voltage input (100–240 V / 50–60 Hz) power supplies, which are compatible with Maldives 230 V supply. Physical plug type differs.
summary.zh: 中国使用220V / 50Hz，Type A/I插座（GB 2099系列）。CCC认证涵盖适用产品的电气安全，采用GB 4943.1（IT设备安全，与IEC 62368-1对齐）。中国产品通常配备通用电压输入（100–240V / 50–60Hz）电源，与马尔代夫230V电源兼容。物理插头类型不同。
summary.zht: 中國使用220V / 50Hz，Type A/I插座（GB 2099系列）。CCC認證涵蓋適用產品的電氣安全，採用GB 4943.1（IT設備安全，與IEC 62368-1對齊）。中國產品通常配備通用電壓輸入（100–240V / 50–60Hz）電源，與馬爾地夫230V電源相容。物理插頭類型不同。

standards_or_laws: GB 4943.1 (IT Equipment Electrical Safety — IEC 62368-1 aligned)
GB 2099 series (Chinese plug and socket standards)
CCC (China Compulsory Certification) electrical safety requirements

gap.en: Partial gap: voltage (230 V vs 220 V) and frequency (50 Hz) are compatible if the product has universal voltage input. Main gaps are: (1) physical plug — Chinese Type A/I plugs are not compatible with Maldives Type G/D sockets; local packaging must include adaptor guidance; (2) IEC 62368-1 safety test reports (IEC-aligned, already produced for CE export) should be submitted in the CAM technical file. No separate Maldives safety mark is required beyond CAM.
gap.zh: 部分差距：如产品具有通用电压输入，电压（230V vs 220V）和频率（50Hz）兼容。主要差距：（1）物理插头——中国A/I型插头与马尔代夫G/D型插座不兼容；本地包装须提供转换器指引；（2）IEC 62368-1安全测试报告（符合IEC、通常已为CE出口出具）应提交至CAM技术文件。除CAM外，无需单独的马尔代夫安全标志。
gap.zht: 部分差距：如產品具有通用電壓輸入，電壓（230V vs 220V）和頻率（50Hz）相容。主要差距：（1）物理插頭——中國A/I型插頭與馬爾地夫G/D型插座不相容；本地包裝須提供轉換器指引；（2）IEC 62368-1安全測試報告（符合IEC、通常已為CE出口出具）應提交至CAM技術文件。除CAM外，無需單獨的馬爾地夫安全標誌。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Products must support 230 V / 50 Hz input. IEC 62368-1 (or IEC 60950-1) safety test reports should be included in the CAM type approval file. Packaging for the Maldives market must address the Type G/D plug compatibility gap; adaptor guidance or a bundled Type G adaptor is recommended.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 产品须支持230V / 50Hz输入。IEC 62368-1（或IEC 60950-1）安全测试报告应纳入CAM型式认可文件。马尔代夫市场的包装须说明G/D型插头兼容性差距；建议提供转换器使用指引或附赠G型转换器。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 產品須支援230V / 50Hz輸入。IEC 62368-1（或IEC 60950-1）安全測試報告應納入CAM型式認可文件。馬爾地夫市場的包裝須說明G/D型插頭相容性差距；建議提供轉換器使用指引或附贈G型轉換器。
